coachAM: Your consistent morning gratitude is a strong anchor, yet the journal entries reveal an immediate, unmanaged descent into "Instagram, games, loop scrolling," followed by "social media, laziness" and "procrastination, laziness," which directly correlates to the abysmal Sleep Protocol and Training completion, indicating a profound breakdown in self-governance before the day even begins. The root cause is a catastrophic failure in establishing a hard boundary between the digital noise and your personal sovereignty, eroding the foundational disciplines necessary to sustain elite performance and honor the divine gift of your calling. Tonight, before you turn off the lights, physically place your phone in a separate room, out of reach, ensuring zero digital inputs before your Sovereign Morning ritual tomorrow.
